home.description: This tool will help you assess whether you meet the requirements for Spain's Extraordinary Regularization 2026.
home.disclaimer: This tool is for informational purposes ONLY.
home.privacy: We do not collect personally identifiable data.

q1.title: Arrival Date in Spain
q1.question: Did you arrive in Spain before December 31, 2025?
q1.help: To be eligible, you must have arrived in Spain before this date.

q2.title: Continuous Residence
q2.question: Have you lived continuously in Spain for at least 5 months before filing your application?
q2.help: A minimum continuous residence of 5 months is required.

q3.title: Criminal Record
q3.question: Do you have a clean criminal record in Spain and in your countries of residence for the last 5 years?
q3.help: You must not have a criminal record to be eligible.

q4.title: Asylum Application
q4.question: Are you an asylum seeker with an application filed before December 31, 2025?
q4.help: If you are an asylum seeker, your application must have been filed before this date. If you are not an asylum seeker, select 'Not applicable'.

results.title: Your Assessment Result
results.eligibleDesc: Based on your answers, you appear to meet the basic requirements for the Extraordinary Regularization 2026.
results.notEligible: You do not meet the requirements
results.notEligibleDesc: Based on your answers, you may not meet some of the basic requirements. We recommend consulting with a specialized lawyer.
results.reviewDesc: Your situation may require a more detailed review by a legal professional.

checklist.title: Required Documents
checklist.subtitle: Check off the documents you already have ready

doc1.name: Valid passport, travel document, or registration certificate
doc1.detail: A valid and current identity document.

doc2.name: Criminal record certificate
doc2.detail: Must be legalized or apostilled. From Spain and from countries of residence in the last 5 years.

doc3.name: Proof of residence in Spain
doc3.detail: Municipal registration certificate, medical appointments, contracts, bills, or other documents proving your stay.

doc4.name: Asylum application (if applicable)
doc4.detail: Documentation proving the international protection application filed before 12/31/2025.

calendar.title: Key Dates and Deadlines
calendar.subtitle: Keep these important dates in mind

date1.title: Online submission begins
date1.desc: The period to submit applications online opens.

date3.title: Application deadline
date3.desc: Last day to submit your application. Don't wait until the last moment!

calendar.appointmentInfo: Visit the Ministry of Inclusion, Social Security and Migration website to request your appointment.
calendar.warning: ⚠️ Deadlines are strict. Prepare your documents in advance.
